## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and AI search optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on developing long-form, question-rich content to optimize for AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Prioritize whale watching content to capitalize on the current season](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Create monthly "Things to Do" articles for each location to target long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Streamline image handling process between Adventures Group and GrowthX teams](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

## Topics

### AI Search Optimization Strategy

  - [Develop longer articles (3000+ words) with numerous questions and answers](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Consolidate related topics into comprehensive guides (e.g., whale watching guide)](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Leverage diverse distribution channels, including reviews and social media presence](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Structure content with easily extractable overviews and tables for AI digestion](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Monitor potential traffic loss to AI overviews and adjust keyword strategy accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Content Development Progress

  - [Workflows set up for automatic Spanish localization](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [AI context being fed with tour information for each location](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [50+ content ideas generated, including monthly "Things to Do" articles](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Prioritizing whale watching content due to current season](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Planning yearly refreshed pillar posts (e.g., "Best Things to Do in Puerto Vallarta in 2025")](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### Technical Challenges

  - [404 errors encountered during internal linking for Spanish content](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Image resizing and insertion process currently manual and time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Exploring options to streamline content approval and publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)

### Collaboration on Content Creation

  - [Adventures Group to provide local insights and tour information](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate destination-specific details (e.g., fire pits, sunset sailing) into nightlife content](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create a slide summarizing key points for AI search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Adventures Group to review and prioritize content ideas shared by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve 404 errors in Spanish content internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [Explore ways to streamline image handling process between teams](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Adventures Group to provide nightlife-related tour information for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
  - [Continue developing and publishing prioritized content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/y7nhfy4BzamjtFJsZ1J71ZGedeAy1rxE?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
